50,...","sourceBlockIds":["9dc10f41-6fc8-4d72-90c4-0b798bfdddfd","48b16fa5-354b-4fd7-9bbb-79687670cbe7","affed99e-6467-4243-95f9-b76bff6c7ed4","dd52bbe2-ec28-4815-a6e7-da234567c90a","7ac7d12b-bb62-47e7-ac24-2cc4329adf15","7064df22-2cf2-4b71-9b9a-5cd8ea275e10","eb7569f0-c136-4fa7-af74-b214c9da41c2","3c7329d6-82b4-463a-99fb-1da8d1befa25","1c96b1bc-5173-4273-904a-6cdb5d81f2e0","120d6255-9dad-4eb4-b2c5-104c0ffb98dc","f2db634a-7db5-479e-a7e8-3f1bd58e6b79","cbbeef69-3b88-4211-a154-eda6fa3c8441","2df93854-6144-43ec-a65d-15913befcd50","b22dbadf-ec4d-4d99-9575-8fec53973d13","0b3b92a6-05b2-4ffa-83e4-73beb23be3ba","f9273296-4be3-4cc9-b576-bf81202ccb9d","1158d34d-4892-4e4f-bad2-af1b33f91323","bddad0d7-b0e0-471b-bca0-88c53a864c19","5ca46162-ac22-474b-8a05-152bb2ed2202","31e461d7-e79f-43f8-9fe3-79cb553e9c1f","72481113-3ee0-4d3a-a150-5cbd3e2889be","ad41170a-2c83-4f96-83ae-dd74348ce976","d3be35de-e991-4c38-9486-b0158a16b5be","7733a005-61e7-48d0-9de6-ae95b03e3b5f","3be4c9da-287e-4c39-b622-3a9811dc8295","377942aa-bb39-4bab-92f1-afd71bb221e6","63b2bc70-d1d7-4373-95d6-3e311a628c19","cbd2077b-4669-403d-bc33-2d1dad208c17","6e2509dc-3527-4122-8159-2a1e784acb87","7dfac2c9-d920-4058-b6ac-a43ee42f55dc","a3315685-23dc-4213-96c8-9260d3d5d703","c29aabe7-0f78-4d39-8a6f-881d2436408d","c772dac0-0379-498c-ab9c-64a596cec30c","1a84b51e-c3b7-426f-b396-f036071feada","a0cd72e2-c151-40f0-8fdf-3eaa0c647544","783e5fda-cf73-44bf-9610-47f0983dc6b9","71afff77-da35-427a-be94-1866064313d1","c333710f-9b31-45a5-b35c-1527e46996a0","15f464be-7135-4ed3-bd6e-322be8cbc515","73a7578d-b54a-45da-96d6-56f8e6133f25","5ab2a4b3-ab67-4b52-831a-4a9c0d49e976","c31a4370-d774-41be-a715-9c8b62487857","f56395c0-ebbd-482b-b2f4-b88f089b6f37","a4c974de-8935-4454-805d-54b8da86c28c","28961568-b846-48fc-84f0-62a63cbc58b9","5492758a-d113-44c3-95e4-811bc0957674","c28f7ed8-caf3-43d9-b4c6-7a4c3cc42c4f","37821c6b-6732-46bf-9116-3c513d2fd9cd","8f8b0675-cfe4-4b87-90df-2a64a3c4d039","20d300fb-011f-4860-89e0-155a8da5aa53","9f925c70-47f4-4b31-b58c data: {"type":"text-start","id":"text-15a8c9f5-fd6a-4c26-9942-81e88d7baeba"}

data: {"type":"text-delta","id":"text-15a8c9f5-fd6a-4c26-9942-81e88d7baeba","delta":"The 2025 tax return for Jordan Whittaker shows the following key details:\n\n1. **Filing Status**: Single [S2].\n2. **Income**: Total income is reported as $27,645, which consists primarily of wages, salaries, and tips [S2][S8].\n3. **Adjusted Gross Income (AGI)**: The AGI is also $27,645 [S2][S8].\n4. **Deductions**: Total deductions amount to $15,750, an increase from $13,850 in the previous year [S2][S8].\n5. **Taxable Income**: Taxable income is calculated at $11,895 [S2][S8].\n6. **Tax Calculation**: The total tax before credits is $1,188 [S2][S8]. The effective tax rate is approximately 9.99% [S2].\n7. **Payments and Refund**: Withholdings total $4,879, leading to a refund of $533 [S2][S8]. The refund is set to be received via direct deposit [S8].\n8. **State Tax Information**: The state income tax shown for Georgia is $812, with an actual state income reflecting the same [S1][S7].\n\nOverall, the return reflects a significant decrease in income compared to the previous year, but the individual is still eligible for a refund due to withholdings exceeding their calculated tax liability."}
